section.title: value
section.para: Concrete data reflecting the actual modification cost.
section.programlisting: <xliff srcLang="en" trgLang="es" version="2.2" xmlns:pvn="urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:pvn:2.3" xmlns:its="http://www.w3.org/2005/11/its" xmlns="urn:oasis:names:tc:xliff:document:2.2"> <file id="f1"> <unit id="1" its:locQualityRatingScore="0.968"> <pvn:provenance> <pvn:change agentName="Google Translate" appliesTo="target" date="2026-05-05T21:06:00Z"> <pvn:usage unit="characters">66</pvn:usage> <pvn:new>O seu certificado anual de impostos está dispoñible para descarga.</pvn:new> </pvn:change> <pvn:change agentName="TAUS MTQE" appliesTo="its:locQualityRatingScore" date="2026-05-05T21:07:00Z"> <pvn:usage unit="characters">66</pvn:usage> <pvn:new>0.968</pvn:new> </pvn:change> <pvn:change agentName="gpt-5.5" appliesTo="target" date="2026-05-05T21:08:00Z" intent="This version sounds slightly smoother and more idiomatic: 'para descargar' is often preferred over 'para descarga' in everyday usage."> <pvn:usage unit="tokens">45</pvn:usage> <pvn:previous>O seu certificado anual de impostos está dispoñible para descarga.</pvn:previous> <pvn:new>O seu certificado anual de impostos xa está dispoñible para descargar.</pvn:new> </pvn:change> </pvn:provenance> <segment> <source>Your annual tax certificate is now available for download.</source> <target>O seu certificado anual de impostos xa está dispoñible para descargar.</target> </segment> </unit> </file> </xliff>
